Import TensorFlow, tf_slim, and necessary functions from object_detection module
Set up the path to the pipeline.config file
Load the pipeline configuration using config_util.get_configs_from_pipeline_file() method
Create an instance of pipeline_pb2.TrainEvalPipelineConfig() and read the content of the pipeline.config file into it using text_format.Merge()
Add the line 'pipeline_config.eval_input_reader.max_number_of_boxes = 500' directly to the pipeline_config object
Verify that adding the line directly to the pipeline.config file does not cause any errors during model training
Create a dummy input tensor for images with dimensions (1, image_size, image_size, 3) and labels with dimensions (1, num_classes)
Define the number of classes as 1000
Call the object detection model function with the input tensors and the updated pipeline_config
Observe if the model trains successfully or throws an error related to max_number_of_boxes not being set correctly
Monitor the output during training and verify if the model is able to detect more than 100 objects per image
Assert that without setting the correct values in pipeline.config, the model's performance does not improve as expected
